description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a cartoonish fox, featuring a vibrant orange body with a white belly, inner ears, and muzzle. The toy has large, expressive yellow and black eyes, a black nose, and a wide, friendly smile that gives it a cheerful appearance. Its ears are oversized and rounded, adding to its playful and approachable look. The paws are tipped with black, and the toy is seated with its legs splayed out and arms slightly forward. The surface appears soft and fuzzy, with some visible wear and slight discoloration on the left leg. The toy sits on a checkered fabric base, which is not part of the toy itself.
description: A plush orange fox stuffed toy with large ears, big yellow eyes, and a friendly smile, seated with splayed legs and black-tipped paws. The surface is soft and fuzzy, giving it a cuddly appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fox's face, large eyes, smiling mouth, and both arms and legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the fox's head, one large ear, and the extended front and back legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, body, and tail, with both ears and the checkered base visible.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the back of the head, one ear, and the side of the body and legs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and friendly, with wide, open eyes and a broad, smiling mouth. The eyes are large and round, giving the toy an inviting and playful look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting with legs splayed out in front and arms slightly forward, head upright and ears perked up.
